steps.description:
Enter the email of the users. This may be used for resetting passwords, sending notifications, etc.
For email notifications to work, the Administrator must configure a default outgoing email server using the `New Email Account` action.
steps.label: Email
steps.title: Email

steps.description: A first name is required. You can use something generic like "Manager" or "ChurchManager".
steps.label: First Name
steps.title: First Name

steps.description: You may want to update the timezone if it doesn't match what you would expect.
steps.label: Time Zone
steps.title: Timezone

steps.description:
Select "Church" as the Module Profile.
This gives the user access to all the 'Church' app modules.

⚠️ After saving this user, come back to this page and assign the "Church Manager" (or "Church User") 'RoleProfile' to this user (Not just the "Church Manager" permission). This will give the user permission to actually make changes to the Church records.
steps.label: Module Profile
steps.title: Module Profile

steps.description: After saving the user, you can come back to this settings tab to set (reset) the user's password.
steps.label: Mute Sounds
steps.title: Settings
